title: Notifications - Onboarding - Allow, UI
scenario: Notification master toggle and individual notification settings are accessible in App Settings > General after onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete the onboarding flow.
2. When prompted during onboarding, tap "Allow" to grant notification permissions.
3. After onboarding completes, navigate to the Home screen.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or your profile icon to access App Settings.
5. Go to App Settings → General → Notifications.
expected: The Notifications screen displays a master toggle for Notifications set to ON. Individual notification settings (e.g., call alerts, meeting reminders, firmware updates) are visible and can be toggled on/off independently.
